message:
fix: health status method ref, pool dealloc panic guard, browser health reason precedence

grpc/health: changes closure `.all(|s| s.is_healthy())` to method
reference `.all(ServingStatus::is_healthy)` for consistency with the
rest of the codebase.

types/resource: SymbolPool::deallocate test verifies that returning a
buffer with the wrong symbol size panics without corrupting pool state.
The test uses catch_unwind to confirm the panic, then checks that
deallocations/current_usage/free_count are unchanged. A valid buffer
returned afterwards succeeds normally.

packages/browser/src/index.ts: fixes lane-health reason precedence in
browserExecutionCandidates. Previously, a lane with both a hard
prerequisite failure (e.g., missing WebAssembly) and stale health
demotion state would surface "candidate_lane_unhealthy" as the reason,
hiding the real prerequisite failure. The fix now only reports
lane-health as the candidate rejection reason when the ladder's selected
reason code is actually "demote_due_to_lane_health", ensuring hard
failures remain visible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
